title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
